sections.paragraph:
Original: טלא

Transliteration: ṭâlâ'

Phonetic: taw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to patch, spot, be spotted, be coloured
    1. (Qal)
      1. to spot
      2. spotted (participle)
    2. (Pual) to be patched

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 805

Part(s) of speech: Verb
